recent.title: Quantization: The Size vs Quality Trade-Off
recent.description: Models can shrink down to a fraction of their size and still be useful. That's the power of quantization: Trading a bit of precision for massive gains in speed and size. In Transformers.js, you control that trade-off with a single parameter
